entry.lex: Between January 3rd and 8th, Contepec experienced a consistent daily temperature cycle, with daytime highs reaching approximately 18°C and nighttime lows dipping to around 5-6°C. The weather remained dry with no precipitation, transitioning from clear skies to periods of broken or overcast clouds, particularly toward the end of the period. Wind speeds generally remained light, though occasional gusts peaked over 14 m/s.

entry.lex: Between January 3 and January 8, Jonesville will experience fluctuating temperatures ranging from a high of 9.31°C to a low of -2.15°C. The period starts with cloudy skies, transitioning to clear conditions by January 5, before a significant weather shift on January 6 brings light snow, freezing rain, and moderate rain with high humidity. The forecast concludes with a return to partly cloudy skies and cooling temperatures.

originaltripleset.otriple: Agua Dulce, MX | experienced | transition from rainy, overcast conditions to clearer skies and warmer temperatures

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: Agua Dulce, MX | experienced | transition from rainy, overcast conditions to clearer skies and warmer temperatures

entry.lex: The weather forecast for Agua Dulce, MX, from January 3rd to 8th shows a transition from rainy, overcast conditions to clearer skies and warmer temperatures. Early in the period, temperatures hovered around 18-21°C with frequent light rain. A notable warming trend peaked on January 5th and 6th, with maximum temperatures reaching 26.2°C under clear skies. The latter half of the forecast indicates a return to intermittent light rain and overcast skies, with temperatures stabilizing between 19°C and 24°C.

originaltripleset.otriple: weather in Kankan, Guinea | was | consistently dry

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: weather in Kankan, Guinea | was | consistently dry

entry.lex: In Kankan, Guinea, from January 3 to January 8, 2024, the weather was consistently dry with no precipitation. Temperatures followed a daily cycle, peaking between 33°C and 37°C in the afternoons and dropping to lows around 20°C to 22°C at night. Conditions shifted from broken and scattered clouds to clear skies, with a period of overcast skies occurring between January 6 and 8. Humidity remained low, ranging from 8% to 22%.

Conditions cleared significantly from Jan 5-6, reaching a peak temperature of 25.7°C under clear skies. The period ended with a return to overcast conditions and light rain on Jan 7, before stabilizing with broken clouds and temperatures around 21.9°C by Jan 8.

From January 3 to January 8, 2024, Shuidong, China, experienced mild weather with temperatures ranging from a low of 15.8°C to a peak of 23.01°C. The period began and ended with predominantly overcast skies, though a notable clear spell occurred between January 4 and 6. Winds remained moderate, peaking around 7.8 m/s, with humidity fluctuating between 49% and 92%.

In Ljungbyholm, SE, the weather starts with significant snowfall and temperatures around -3°C through January 4th. A cooling trend follows, with temperatures dropping to a low of -17.6°C by January 6th under clear to scattered cloud conditions. entry.lex: Over the period from January 3 to January 8 in Churánov, temperatures trend steadily downward, starting at 4.55°C and dropping to a low of -9.78°C. The weather begins with light rain, transitions to snow on January 4, and alternates between overcast clouds and light snow through January 8. Wind speeds are strongest initially, with gusts up to 20.81 m/s, before calming significantly in the later half of the period.

entry.lex: Between January 3rd and 8th, Imbituva, Brazil, experienced a transition from unstable, rainy weather to clear, hot conditions. The period began with frequent light to moderate rain and cooler temperatures (lows around 15-16°C). By January 6th, the rain ceased, leading to a significant warming trend that peaked on January 7th and 8th with maximum temperatures reaching approximately 33.5°C under clear skies.

Between January 3 and January 8, Dragash experienced fluctuating weather, starting with overcast skies and light rain. Weather in Saint James from January 3rd to 8th begins with clear skies and temperatures peaking around 6°C before dropping to a low of -3.6°C on January 4th. The period is characterized by a transition to overcast conditions, with light snow on January 5th and 7th, and light rain on January 6th. Temperatures generally fluctuate between -4°C and 7°C, with the highest temperature reaching 6.99°C on January 7th.

originaltripleset.otriple: weather | was | characterized by frequent light rain and varying cloud cover

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: weather | was | characterized by frequent light rain and varying cloud cover

entry.lex: Between January 3 and January 8, Rio Chico experienced warm temperatures ranging from a low of 23.01°C to a high of 30.28°C. The weather was characterized by frequent light rain and varying cloud cover, with humidity peaking at 95%. Winds remained light throughout the period.

consistent snowfall | occurred_on | evening of January 7 and continuing through January 8
consistent snowfall | reduced_visibility | notable decrease in visibility

consistent snowfall | occurred_on | evening of January 7 and continuing through January 8
consistent snowfall | reduced_visibility | notable decrease in visibility

entry.lex: Over the period from January 3 to January 8, Semeljci will experience a significant cooling trend, starting with mild temperatures around 11°C and dropping to a low of -1.24°C. The weather will transition from overcast skies and light rain early in the week to consistent snowfall starting the evening of January 7 and continuing through January 8, accompanied by a notable decrease in visibility.

originaltripleset.otriple: period | was | frequent light rain and overcast skies

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: period | was | frequent light rain and overcast skies

entry.lex: In Betz, France, temperatures will steadily decline from around 9°C on January 3rd to near-freezing levels by January 8th. The period begins with frequent light rain and overcast skies, transitioning to cloudy conditions, and concluding with a chance of light snow as temperatures drop to a minimum of -0.34°C.

entry.lex: Between January 3 and January 8, 2024, Ébano, Mexico, experienced mild to warm weather with temperatures ranging from a low of 15.7°C to a peak of 28.6°C on January 5. Conditions transitioned from broken and overcast clouds early in the period to clear skies around January 5-6, before returning to overcast conditions by January 8. Humidity fluctuated significantly, peaking at 96% and dropping to 36% during the warmest period.

originaltripleset.otriple: period | was | characterized by consistently high humidity (91-100%)
skies | was | predominantly cloudy to overcast

modifiedtripleset.mtriple: period | was | characterized by consistently high humidity (91-100%)
skies | was | predominantly cloudy to overcast

entry.lex: Between January 3 and January 8, Pyhäjoki experienced a significant warming trend. Temperatures started extremely cold, hovering around -26°C with wind chills reaching -33°C, before steadily rising to a high of -3.66°C by January 8. The period was characterized by consistently high humidity (91-100%) and predominantly cloudy to overcast skies, with wind speeds peaking at 7.79 m/s on January 7.

major snow event | brought | high humidity
major snow event | brought | poor visibility
major snow event | brought | consistent snowfall

major snow event | brought | poor visibility
major snow event | brought | consistent snowfall

entry.lex: From January 3 to January 8, Târgu Trotuş will experience a significant temperature drop and a transition from overcast skies to heavy snowfall. Temperatures will peak at 12.57°C on January 4 before plummeting to a low of -7.23°C by January 8. While the first few days remain cloudy and dry, a major snow event begins on January 7, bringing high humidity, poor visibility, and consistent snowfall through January 8.

weather | transitioned_to | light snow and freezing temperatures
light snow and freezing temperatures | occurred_on | January 4th
weather | transitioned_to | mostly overcast and cloudy conditions

light snow and freezing temperatures | occurred_on | January 4th

entry.lex: Weather in Nakskov, Denmark, from January 3rd to 8th, 2024, starts with moderate to light rain and temperatures around 6°C, transitioning to light snow and freezing temperatures by January 4th. The period is characterized by a steady cooling trend, with lows reaching approximately -2.8°C and feels-like temperatures dipping as low as -9.2°C. Following the precipitation, the weather stabilizes into mostly overcast and cloudy conditions, eventually clearing to sunny skies by January 8th, accompanied by rising atmospheric pressure.
